{{CargoOrgan
|name=Unidentified Liver
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10874
|idx=81
|description=When discovered, the host had long perished—yet this liver kept pulsing. On rare occasions, it murmurs: “Grind now… rest later…” Some say it once belonged to a legendary Liver—a mythical grinder who pushed past human limits.
|skill=
|hp=2000
|def=180
|atk=172
|rush=292
|gene1=Per 20 Wonder Fungi used, {race} ATK +60
Wonder Fungi Eaten: 60/60
|gene2=Demon Minion Recovery SPD +6%
|gene3=Each round, {race} DEF +60
|gene4=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +3%
|gene5=Per 2 Gastric Pouch LVLs challenged, {race} RUSH +6
Gastric Pouch LVLs: 100/100
|gene7=Demon Minion Recovery SPD +6% (Awakened)
|}}
